title: The Battle for Syrup Village Escalates
description: On pages 12–15, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're Different!! I... I'm a brave warrior of...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Clahador! If you want my money, I will give it all to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Please leave the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: You're wrong, Ojousama... It's not only money that I'm after...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I also want "peace of mind"

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I spent three years here to gain the village's trust

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I feel at peace here

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: only when I have obtained "peace" and "money"...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Will my plans be complete

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's why having my crew attack the village,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And making you leave a will at your death

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Is essential

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Kaya, run!! Don't bother Negotiat- ing with him!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's no longer the Butler you knew!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: click...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: A pistol...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Leave this village!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So... you've become stronger in these years...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Do you still remember? A lot has happened in the last three years

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Since your parents passed away,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We've been together for quite some time

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We took boat rides together...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: went to town together...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: When you're down with a fever, I always stayed by you to take care of you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We've shared our trou- Bles, and our joy...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I've served you tire- lessly!

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: I suffered taking care of this nosy little Ojousama...

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
